summary: Independent L3 plan review found no remaining P0-P2 defects after three corrections. BeginInstall and BeginUpgrade are now read-only preflight hooks, while all catalog writes run only through the versioned post-deploy CLI. CatalogIntegrity defaults to dry-run and requires explicit --apply, actor, and run-id for mutations. Catalog save and shelf guards require a single manifest-managed enabled second-level leaf and reject legacy or unmanaged leaves. Managed catalog imports preserve operator-editable fields, do not implicitly scan or mutate goods, and use no price-mode table; numeric prices remain sourced only from specification rows. Local Python tests are correctly limited to offline contract evidence, while PHP, MySQL, plugin-install, HTTP, API, browser, transaction, and rollback checks remain explicit L4 release blockers rather than claimed passes.
